note: Back-translations (TartuNLP <locale>->en) for QA review of fuzzy-flagged .po entries written by tools/translate_po.py. Where a back-translation diverges materially from the English msgid, a native speaker should review the .po entry directly (it carries the #, fuzzy flag) rather than editing this file.
engine: TartuNLP / Neurotõlge, University of Tartu — https://api.tartunlp.ai/translation/v2

et_back.You already own a complete double-entry: You already have a complete double-entry ledger. Every Cashbook entry you've logged is under a real journal entry — Cashbook is just a cash-basis view over it. Turn on the full suite every time, nothing will match.
et_back.Your existing cashbook entries are alrea: Your existing cashbook entries are already journal entries — nothing will be converted or re-clawed if you switch
et_back.They stay accessible under Banking &rsaq: They remain accessible under banking › Magazine Entries
et_back.You'll gain the full screens for the sam: Get full screens on the same ledger: Bills, Bills, Purchase Orders, Payrolls and Reports
et_back.The simplified Cashbook navigation is re: Simplified Cashbook navigation is replaced by a full sidebar and takes effect immediately
et_back.Note: this switch runs one way — once a: Note: this switch works the same way — if the company is on an integer, it cannot go back to the simplified Cashbook nav. Nothing is lost; the ledger holds every entry either way.

ru_back.You already own a complete double-entry: You already have a full double counting. Every record in the bank you've registered is a real record in the magazine underneath it — "Cashbook" is just a cash look. At any time, turn on the full suite, no switches.
ru_back.Your existing cashbook entries are alrea: Your existing recordings in your cash books are already diaries — nothing is transformed or switched when you switch.
ru_back.They stay accessible under Banking &rsaq: They remain accessible under Banking · Journal Entries
ru_back.You'll gain the full screens for the sam: You'll get full screens for the same accounting book: invoices, invoices, purchase orders, payment orders and reports.
ru_back.The simplified Cashbook navigation is re: Simplified navigation at Cashbook is being replaced in full, and this will come into effect immediately.
ru_back.Note: this switch runs one way — once a: Note: This switch operates in one direction — once the company is fully accounted for, it will not be able to return to the simplified Cashbook navigation system. Nothing is lost; the book keeps all entrances in any direction.
